  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVidia GTX 760-equivalent or better, 2+Gb VRAM, DirectX 11 compliant
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 20 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX 11 compatible sound card
